name: Minor Flesh Wound
desc: A deep cut or stab that, while not life threatening, makes normal function far more difficult.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* The first time you take Damage each Round you gain _Bleeding_ 1.
* Whenever undertaking strenuous physical activity, add _Stress_ as a stake.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_.

name: Minor Concussion
desc: A minor head wound that makes it difficult to focus and remain fully lucid.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Lose 3 _Guard_ at _Respite_.
* You may not play the Observation Augment.
* Whenever a Talent would grant information, roll a d6; on a 2-, you cannot remember anything except vague details. Any resources spent to gain this information are still lost.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_.

name: Blood Loss
desc: You've lost a great deal of blood, leaving you weak and light-headed.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Your maximum _Stamina_ is reduced by 2, to a minimum of 1.
* Lose 1 _Momentum_ at _Respite_.
* In _Skill Challenges_ (including _Travel Rolls_) replace a _Stress_ stake with _Fatigue_ or add a _Stress_ stake, as appropriate.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_. You may automatically mark a segment by consuming an extra portion of _Food_ during the _Camp Phase_.

name: Hypoxia
desc: The side effects of being deprived of oxygen for too long.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Lose 2 _Guard_ at _Respite_.
* Lose 1 _Momentum_ at _Respite_.
* Your counter for _Suffocating_ is one shorter.
* In _Skill Challenges_ (including _Travel Rolls_) replace a _Stress_ stake with _Fatigue_ or add a _Stress_ stake, as appropriate.
remove: This Wound has a 2 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_.

name: Moderate Concussion
desc: A head wound that makes it very difficult to focus and remain fully lucid.
effect:
This Wound takes up 2 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Lose 3 _Guard_ at _Respite_.
* You always have the _Dazed_ Condition.
* You may not play the Observation Augment.
* Whenever undertaking strenuous mental activity, add _Stress_ as a stake.
* Whenever a Talent would grant information, roll a d6; on a 4-, you cannot remember anything except vague details. Any resources spent to gain this information are still lost.
remove: This Wound has a 4 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with a _Minor Concussion_ and _Fatigue_.

name: Minor Leg Injury
desc: A minor leg injury that hampers mobility to a small degree, like a rolled ankle.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the _Movement_ gained at _Respite_ by 1.
* Roll one less die whenever your ability to use your legs is important, such as _Travel Rolls_.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_.

name: Moderate Leg Injury
desc: A leg injury that hampers mobility significantly, typically inflicted from a powerful attack.
effect:
This Wound takes up 2 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the _Movement_ gained at _Respite_ by 1.
* You are always _Slowed_, and may not clear it by any means.
* Take a -1 _Penalty_ to _Reflex_.
* Add an extra _Fatigue_ stake in _Travel Rolls_.
* Roll one less die whenever your ability to use your legs is important, such as _Travel Rolls_.
remove: This Wound has a 4 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace this with _Fatigue_ and a _Minor Leg Injury_.

name: Major Leg Injury
desc: One of your legs is grievously injured and barely usable, leaving you limping and immobile.
effect:
This Wound takes up 3 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the _Movement_ gained at _Respite_ by 2.
* You are always _Slowed_, and may not clear it by any means.
* You may not gain _Movement_ after _Respite_.
* Take a -1 _Penalty_ to _Reflex_, and roll with _Disadvantage_.
* Add an extra _Fatigue_ stake in _Travel Rolls_.
* You may not purchase the _Speed_ _Advantage_ except with die granted to you by other characters.
* Roll two less die whenever your ability to use your legs is important, such as _Travel Rolls_.
remove: This Wound has a 5 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace this with _Fatigue_ and a _Moderate Leg Injury_.

name: Minor Arm Injury
desc: A minor arm injury that hampers its use to a small degree, like a sprained wrist.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the Momentum gained at Respite by 1.
* Roll one less die whenever your ability to use your arm is important, and take 1 Stress if you do any Camp or Travel Actions that requires both your arms.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_.

name: Moderate Arm Injury
desc: A moderate arm injury that makes it difficult to use an arm without completely limiting its use.
effect:
This Wound takes up 2 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the Momentum gained at Respite by 2.
* You are always _Impaired_, and cannot clear it by any means.
* Roll one less die whenever your ability to use your arm is important, and you cannot take any _Camp_ or _Travel Actions_ that require both your arms.
remove: This Wound has a 4 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_ and a _Minor Arm Injury_.

name: Major Arm Injury
desc: A major arm injury that makes an arm all but unusable.
effect:
This Wound takes up 3 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Decrease the Momentum gained at Respite by 3.
* You cannot use one arm in any way.
* You are always _Impaired_, and cannot clear it by any means.
* You have _Disadvantage_ on all _Parry_ _Defense Rolls_.
* Gain an automatic _Stress_ each morning.
* Roll two less die whenever your ability to use your arm is important, and you cannot take any _Camp_ or _Travel Actions_ that require both your arms.
remove: This Wound has a 5 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace it with _Fatigue_ and a _Moderate Arm Injury_.

name: Minor Contusion
desc: A heavy impact that doesn't break the skin, but leaves minor internal damage.
effect:
This Wound takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Lose an additional _Guard_ whenever you take Damage.
* Whenever undertaking strenuous physical activity, add _Stress_ as a stake.
remove: This Wound has a 3 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace this with _Fatigue_.

name: Moderate Contusion
desc: A heavy impact that doesn't break the skin, but leaves internal damage that makes normal function difficult.
effect:
This Wound takes up 2 sections of your Health Bar. While you have this Wound:
* Lose an additional 2 _Guard_ whenever you take Damage.
* Whenever undertaking strenuous physical activity, add _Fatigue_ as a stake.
* Automatically gain _Stress_ at the start of each day.
remove: This Wound has a 4 segment Clock to heal. When healed, replace this with _Fatigue_ and a _Minor Contusion_.

name: Stress
desc: The stress and strain of adventuring is taking a toll, impacting your mental state.
effect: This Affliction takes up 1 section of your Health Bar, but has no effect on its own.
remove: This Affliction may be removed with a variety of items (such as high quality food) and Camp Actions, such as _Vent_.

name: Extreme Stress
desc: You are irritable, unfocused, and unable to work as a team.
effect:
This Affliction takes up none of your Health Bar, and is only inflicted when _Stress_ is replaced. While you have this Affliction:
* You may not clear _Stress_.
* You may not aid allies in _Skill Challenges_ and may not aid them.
* You may not forge _Bonds_.
* Gain 1 less _Momentum_ at _Respite_.
remove: This Affliction has a 3 segment Clock to heal. Any action that would allow you to clear _Stress_ may mark progress on this Clock.

name: Fatigue
desc: You are tired, whether from travel, the throes of battle, or just overexerting yourself.
effect:
This Affliction takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Affliction:
* Lose one _Guard_ at _Respite_.
remove: This Affliction may be removed with an _Efficacy_ during a _Rest Roll_.

name: Exhausted
desc: You are beyond tired from pushing yourself too hard and struggle to stay awake.
effect:
This Affliction takes up none of your Health Bar, and is only inflicted when _Fatigue_ is replaced. While you have this Affliction:
* You may not spend _Efficacy_ from _Rest Rolls_ on anything other than clearing Exhaustion.
* Lose 2 _Guard_ at _Respite_.
remove: This Affliction has a 3 segment Clock to heal. An _Efficacy_ during a _Rest Roll_ fills in a single segment of this Clock.

name: Hungry
desc: Your stomach is empty and a constant distraction.
effect:
This Affliction takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Affliction:
* Lose one _Guard_ at _Respite_.
remove: This Affliction may be removed by consuming an extra portion of _Food_ during the _Camp Phase_.

name: Starving
desc: You are at the brink of starvation and struggling to stay alive.
effect:
This Affliction takes up none of your Health Bar, and is only inflicted when _Hungry_ is replaced. While you have this Affliction:
* Lose two _Guard_ at _Respite_.
* Eating additional food may not be used for anything other than clearing Starving.
remove: This Affliction has a 3 segment Clock to heal. Consuming an extra portion of _Food_ during the _Camp Phase_ clears a segment on this Clock.

name: Thirsty
desc: Your mouth is parched, making everything a bit more difficult.
effect:
This Affliction takes up 1 section of your Health Bar. While you have this Affliction:
* Lose one _Guard_ at _Respite_.
remove: This Affliction may be removed by consuming an extra portion of _Water_ during the _Camp Phase_.

name: Dehydrated
desc: You haven't had water long enough that its substantially impacting your health.
effect:
This Affliction takes up none of your Health Bar, and is only inflicted when _Thirsty_ is replaced. While you have this Affliction:
* Lose two _Guard_ at _Respite_.
* Drinking additional water may not be used for anything other than clearing Dehydrated.
remove: This Affliction has a 3 segment Clock to heal. Consuming an extra portion of Water during the _Camp Phase_ clears a segment on this Clock.

name: Airborne
desc: A creature knocked into the air and unable to defend themselves.
effect: An Airborne creature immediately loses their _Position_ and is _Restrained_. Additionally, while Airborne, they gain _Susceptible_ (_Forced Movement_).
repeat: If an Airborne creature would gain Airborne they instead extend the Airborne duration by a _Phase_.
remove: Creatures are Airborne until the end of the next _Phase_, they suffer _Forced Movement_, or they gain _Flight_. If the creature loses this Airborne by either of the first two means they _Fall_ I. Do not remove _Airborne_ until the creature's _Forced Movement_ is complete.

name: Flying
desc: You are propelled by craft or wing, allowing you to easily soar through the arena.
effect:
While Flying:
* You ignore all non-_Weather_ _Terrain_ effects.
* You have _Advantage_ to _Negate_ with _Reflex_.
* While not _Occupying_ _Terrain_ or _Engaged_ with a non-Flying creature, non-Flying creatures may not become _Engaged_ with you.
* You have _Disadvantage_ to _Negate_ _Prone_ and _Forced Movement_ and, if you are knocked _Prone_, you immediately _Fall_ 1.

If a creature _Occupies_ Terrain, they also lose Flying. If a creature loses Flying naturally (either by choice or their effect granting Flying ending), they may safely land and suffer no ill effects.

name: Entangled
desc: A creature that is entangled in some sort of material, whether that be vines, spider silk, or wires.
effect:
The effect of Entangled depends on the current amount the creature has relative to their _Size_:
* [Size-1]: The creature has _Disadvantage_ on _Attacks_ and _Reflex_ saves.
* [Size]: As Rank 1, but the creature is also _Slowed_.
* [Size+1]: The creature is _Restrained_.
remove: Creatures may clear Entangled by either _Recovering_ and making a _Grit_/_Reflex_ roll [_Negate_ 9] to reduce their Entangled by 1. Alternatively, a creature clears 1 Entangled for every 4 _Slash_ damage they take. A creature may choose to target just the Web when attacking.

name: Suffocating
desc: A creature that is unable to breathe and rapidly losing consciousness.
effect:
When you begin suffocating, start a counter at 6. Decrease the counter by 1 when:
* You take a Turn.
* You lose more Stamina than your _Grit_ from a single effect.
* You make a non-Light Attack.
* You spend 2 or more _Movement_ in a single Turn.

When the counter hits 0, the character immediately gains an _Hypoxia_ _Wound_, then resets the counter. Note that _Hypoxia_ reduces the maximum value of this counter.
remove: Typically, Suffocating can only be removed by effects that specifically remove it. If removed, the counter resets the next time the creature is Suffocating.

name: Alight
desc: An affliction caused when you are on fire.
effect: While a creature has Alight they take _Fire_ Damage equal to its value at the end of their _Turn_, then increases their Alight value by 1 and _Ignite_ their _Engagement_. This Damage ignores _Block_, unless the target has any level of _Resistance_ to _Fire_. Additionally, the creature can be treated as a _Minor Source_ [_Flame_]. Finally, they increase their [_Cold_] Resistance by 1 step.
repeat: Alight stacks, and if a creature gains Alight again combine the values.
remove: When a creature _Recovers_ they may _Negate_ with _Reflex_ and reduce their Alight by half the result. They may choose to drop _Prone_ as a part of this; if they do, they roll with _Advantage_ and instead reduce their Alight by the full value. Additionally, if a creature gains _Soaked_ they clear all Alight.
special: Creatures with _Resistance_ (_Fire_) reduces any afflicted Alight by their number of _Resistance_ steps, and automatically clears the same amount of _Alight_ at _Respite_.

name: Bleeding
desc: You are actively bleeding and rapidly losing your ability to fight.
effect:
While a creature has Bleeding they lose _Stamina_ equal to its value at the end of their _Turn_, and lose _Stamina_ equal to half its value when they take a _Reaction_ on other _Turns_. A character that ends combat Bleeding and has no way to clear it automatically gains a _Blood Loss_ _Wound_. If a character would be _Downed_ by Bleeding, suffer the below effects:
* **6-12**: Gain a _Blood Loss_ _Wound_.
* **3-5**: Gain two _Blood Loss_ _Wounds_.
* **2-**: Gain three _Blood Loss_ _Wounds_.
repeat: Bleeding stacks, and if a creature gains Bleeding again combine the values.
remove: Only effects that specifically remove Bleeding remove it.

name: Soaked
desc: You are drenched in water.
effect:
While a creature is Soaked:
* Increase their _Resistance_ to _Fire_ by one step.
* They may not gain _Alight_. If they would gain at least _Alight_ 3 from a single effect, remove Soaked.
* Increase their weakness to _Cold_ by one step; if they take _Cold_ damage, remove Soaked and automatically inflict _Frost_ 2.
* Increase their _Weakness_ to _Lightning_ by two steps.
remove: Only effects that specifically remove Soaked remove it.

name: Blinded
desc: When a creature's eyesight is hindered, rendering them unable to effectively see.
effect: A Blinded creature sees all creatures within Range 3 as _Lightly Obscured_ and all creatures beyond that range as _Heavily Obscured_. Additionally, Attacks against a Blinded creature gain a +1 _Bonus_.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Blinded.
repeat: If a Blinded creature would gain Blinded they instead extend the Blinded duration by 1 _Phase_.
remove: Creatures are Blinded until the end of the next _Phase_.

name: Joyful
desc: A mental affliction caused when a creature's heart is full of joy.
effect: While Joyful a creature gains +1 _Reflex_. While _Engaged_ with an allied creature a creature may remove Joyful at any time for 2 _Momentum_ or 1 _Movement_.
repeat: If a Joyful creature would gain Joyful they instead gain 1 _Momentum_.
reacts: <ins>_Anguished_:</ins> If a creature is _Anguished_ and would gain Joyful, they instead remove _Anguished_.

name: Courageous
desc: A mental affliction caused when a creature's heart is full of bravery.
effect: While Joyful a creature gains +1 _Grit_. While _Engaged_ with a hostile creature a creature may remove Courageous at any time to clear 5 _Block_ or to _Recover_.
repeat: If a Courageous creature would gain Courageous they instead gain 1 _Momentum_.
reacts: <ins>_Frightened_:</ins> If a creature is _Frightened_ and would gain Courageous, they instead remove _Frightened_.

name: Calm
desc: A mental affliction caused when a creature's mind is clear and avoiding violence.
effect: While Calm a creature gains +1 _Focus_. If a creature does not make an Attack on their _Turn_ they may remove _Calm_ to gain 3 _Momentum_.
repeat: If a Calm creature would gain Calm they gain 1 _Momentum_.
reacts: <ins>_Enraged_:</ins> If a creature is _Enraged_ and would gain Calm, they instead remove _Enraged_.

name: Disarm
desc: An effect where an item is wrenched away from a creature.
effect: An item the Target has _Worn_ or _Wielded_ (chosen when this Status is inflicted by the Attacker) is immediately dropped unattended in the current _Arena_. If the Attacker has the appropriate _Free Hands_, they must choose to instead immediately _Wield_ the item.

name: Dazed
desc: An affliction caused when a creature is rattled and off-balance and unable to defend.
effect: Defense Rolls made by a Dazed creature have _Disadvantage_.
repeat: If a Dazed creature would gain Dazed they instead lose 2 _Guard_.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Dazed.

name: Taunted
desc: An affliction caused when a creature is single-mindedly focused on a foe.
effect: While a player character is Taunted all Attacks that do not target the creature that inflicted Taunted are made at _Disadvantage_. When any other creature is Taunted, they ignore their normal targeting for Attacks and instead may only target the creature that inflicted Taunt. Additionally, in either case, any _Movement_ that does not bring you closer to the creature that inflicted Taunted has its cost increased by 1.
repeat: If a Taunted creature would gain Taunted use the new Taunted inflictor as the target of this Status.
remove: If the creature that inflicted Taunted targets another creature with an Attack, you may immediately _Negate_ [_Focus_ 7] to clear Taunted.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Taunted.

name: Engaged
desc: A status showing that two creatures are engaged in close combat with one another.
effect: While Engaged spending _Movement_ creates an _Opening_. Additionally, while _Engaged_, a character has _Disadvantage_ all Attacks that do not Target at least one creature they are Engaged with.
remove: Characters may spend 1 _Movement_ to remove all instances of Engaged, as well as any _Terrain Bonus_ or _Hazard_.

name: Exposed
desc: An affliction caused when an opening in a creature's defenses has been forced open.
effect: Attack against an Exposed creature have _Advantage_.
repeat: If an Exposed creature would gain Exposed they instead lose 2 _Guard_.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Exposed.

name: Grabbed
desc: A status caused when creatures are locked in close combat and clinging to one another.
effect:
When you inflict Grabbed the inflict Attack (or an _Open Hand_ if applicable) may not used except against the Grabbed target. While the Grab persists:
* The defender may not react to _Openings_ you create by spending _Movement_, and vice-versa.
* The defender may not _Dodge_ your Attacks and has _Disadvantage_ to all _Defense Rolls_.
* The defender may not inflict Grabbed on you.
* If the defender is larger than you, while the Grab persists you are always _Engaged_ and move with them.
	* If you (or the total Size of creatures grabbing them) are within one Size of the defender, they are _Hobbled_.
	* If the total Size is equal to or greater than the defender's, they are instead _Immobilized_.
* If the defender is your size or smaller, while the grab persists they are _Immobilized_ and _Engaged_ with you. They move with you and, if they would be _Forcibly Moved_, you may _Negate_ for them. If they are within 1 of your Size, you are _Hobbled_ while this persists.

Alternatively, when you inflict Grabbed you can try to end a grab the target is involved in; a creature grabbed by them may immediately attempt to escape (see Recover) with _Advantage_.
repeat:
If you inflict Grabbed again you secure your hold or otherwise gain an advantage. Choose one:
* Until the grab ends, they have _Disadvantage_ on all Attack Rolls against you.
* You have _Advantage_ on all opposed rolls to maintain this grab.
* The defender has _Disadvantage_ on all opposed rolls to maintain this grab.
* Gain _Advantage_ on your next Attack against the Target before the Grab ends, and add [_Pierce_ 2].
* Choose a limb. They may not use it while the grab persists. If you are smaller than the target, instead increase the cost of all effects using that limb by 1.
* If you are the same size or larger than the defender, inflict _Prone_ or _Push_ (you may not choose to move them) and add [_Pierce_ 2] to any damage dealt to the defender due to this.
* If you are the same size or larger than the defender, end the grab and inflict _Forceful Push_.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may attempt to remove Grabbed. If they are larger than the grabber, they roll _Grit_ opposed by the grabbers _Grit_/_Reflex_. If they are smaller than the grabber, they instead make a _Grit_/_Reflex_ roll opposed by their grabbers's _Grit_. On a success, the grab ends. If the grabber is using more than one hand, they gain a +1 _Bonus_ to the Grab roll. A creature may do this once per Turn per grappler. Alternatively, if a creature is _Forcibly Moved_ in such a way that they would lose their _Engagement_ with the creature that is grabbing them, end the effect. If a creature is Recovering in a way that lets them choose any effect, they have _Advantage_ on this roll.

name: Hobbled
desc: An affliction caused when a creature's movement is impaired somehow.
effect: While Hobbled all Movement costs are increased by 1.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Hobbled.

name: Impaired
desc: An affliction caused when a creature's ability to attack is limited.
effect: Attacks by an Impaired creature have _Disadvantage_.
repeat: If an Impaired creature would gain Impaired they instead lose 2 _Guard_.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Impaired.

name: Immobilized
desc: Your movement is restricted to the degree that you may not move.
effect: While Immobilized a creature may not spend _Movement_ except to remove a _Status Effect_ causing this condition.

name: Poisoned
desc: An affliction caused by toxins ravaging you from the inside out.
effect: While a creature is Poisoned they take _Poison_ _Damage_ equal to its value at the end of their _Turn_, and take _Poison_ _Damage_ equal to half its value when they take a _Reaction_ on other _Turns_. A creature may reduce this Damage by their _Grit_, instead taking that portion as _Guard_. A character that ends combat Poisoned and has no way to clear it automatically gains a single segment _Poison_ _Wound_.
remove: Poisoned is only removed by effects that explicitly remove it.

name: Prone
desc: An effect caused when a foe is knocked flat on their back.
effect: A Prone creature is _Immobilized_. While Prone, Melee attacks against the target gain Advantage, but Medium and Long Range attacks have Disadvantage.
remove: A creature may expend one Movement to end Prone.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may expend one Movement to remove _Prone_ without creating an _Opening_.

name: Pull
desc: You drag a foe closer to you or.
effect:
When you inflict Pull a numeric value will be present. You may inflict a combination of the below effects equal to said value:
* Choose one: 
	* Pull 1:  Place the Target at your _Position_ if they are within your _Arena_, or place them in any _Position_ within their _Arena_ if they are not in your _Arena_.
	* Pull 2:  Place them in any _Position_ in an _Arena_ adjacent to them that places them closer to you. Inflict _Block_ equal to any additional _Movement_ cost to enter said _Arena_.
* Pull X: Cause the _Target_ to _Collide_ X with a _Feature_ at their final _Position_. You may repeat this option.

name: Push
desc: You launch a creature away from you, creating space and sending them away.
effect:
When you inflict Push, choose one:
* If they are _Engaged_ with another creature, immediately inflict 2 _Crush_ Damage on both.
* If they are _Occupying_ Terrain they could slam into, inflict 3 _Crush_ Damage on them and resolve any collision effect on the Terrain.
* Force the target to stop _Occupying_ their current _Terrain_ and leave their current _Engagement_. You may then force them to enter a new _Engagement_ or _Occupy_ _Terrain_ of your choice within their current _Arena_, so long as it does not make them _Engaged_ with you.

If it was a Forceful Push, you may either choose an above option and inflict 2 _Stun_ or move them to an adjacent _Arena_, so long as this moves them to an _Arena_ further from you.

name: Slide
desc: You adroitly move a foe about, placing them where you wish.
effect:
When you inflict Slide a numeric value will be present. You may inflict a combination of the below effects equal to said value:
* Choose one: 
	* Slide 1: You may force the target to stop _Occupying_ their current _Terrain_ and/or place the Target in any other _Engagement_ within their _Arena_.
	* Slide 2: Place them in any _Arena_ adjacent to their current one. Inflict _Block_ equal to any additional _Movement_ cost to enter said _Arena_.
* Slide X: Cause the _Target_ to _Collide_ X with a _Feature_ at their final _Position_.

name: Restrained
desc: An effect cause when a creature's ability to move is severely hampered.
effect: A Restrained creature's ability to move is severely hampered. While Restrained, a creature cannot Move, makes all Attacks with _Disadvantage_, and all Attacks against them have _Advantage_.
remove: How to end Restrained is typically specified in the ability that inflicts it.
repeat: If a Restrained creature would gain Restrained they remain Restrained, but must fulfill all Restrained removal constraints to end the condition.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove Restrained if no other removal method is listed.

name: Studied
desc: An affliction caused when one creature gains knowledge on another.
effect:
Creatures may remove a hostile creature's _Studied_ for one of the following effects:
* Clear _Studied_ at any time to learn the target's current and maximum _Stamina_ and _Block_, their _Defenses_, and any _Weaknesses_/_Resistances_/_Immunities_ they have.
* When making an Attack or Defend Roll targeting or in response to the Target you may clear Studied to increase the result of a single die roll by 1.
recover: When a creature _Recovers_ they may remove _Studied_.

name: Shatter
effect: When a creature gains Shatter a piece of _Worn_ or _Wielded_ _Equipment_ or a _Breakable_ _Trait_ loses 1 _Durability_, chosen by the Attacker. If a creature has no remaining _Equipment_ that can be _Damaged_ they instead gain _Exposed_ and lose 2 _Guard_.

name: Concentrating
desc: A creature that has a singular focus, granting them an enhanced ability to act.
effect: A creature may remove Concentrating to gain _Advantage_ on any Roll.
remove: If _Downed_, a creature loses Concentrating.
